title: Rīga councillor in trouble again over school reunion behaviour
summary_full: The Riga City Council Ethics Commission is to assess the aggressive and rude actions of opposition deputy Rūdolfs Brēmanis (Sovereign Power/Young Latvians Union), which received widespread attention over the weekend.
summary_public: The Riga City Council Ethics Commission is to assess the aggressive and rude actions of opposition deputy Rūdolfs Brēmanis (Sovereign Power/Young Latvians Union), which received widespread attention over the weekend…
